title: CGC: Canopy Growth - Detailed Earnings Estimates - Zacks
text: Zacks provides detailed earnings estimates for Canopy Growth Corporation (CGC). Next quarter EPS estimate: -$0.07 with range of -$0.12 to -$0.04. Revenue expectations show expected growth of 3.56% in the next year. Current consensus estimates reflect analyst expectations across multiple firms. Historical accuracy data shows CGC earnings surprise rate of -94.86% average negative surprise. The company has missed estimates in three of trailing four quarters with one beat. Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) with Growth Score of A indicates analyst confidence in the turnaround narrative. Earnings revisions trend shows recent analyst estimate changes. Price target data reflects consensus price expectations.
